reasoning: Strong cute charm: round soft white body, small dot eyes, warm yellow-orange flame give clear friendly personality — not aggressive, sticker-test friendly. Silhouette at 1x reads as 'small explosion with fire top' but the eye/face details are completely lost at that scale, reducing personality to shape-only. Dark bg: excellent — yellow-orange pops strongly, white body contrasts well, full silhouette crisp. Light bg: yellow-orange still readable but white body partially merges with cream background, weakening lower half definition; dark outline pixels salvage overall shape but the fluffy body charm is diluted. Edge cleanliness at 4x is good — deliberate pixel art with clean boundaries. Sits at marginal: charm is real but 1x detail loss and light-bg white-bleed are genuine readability concerns that stop it from a clean pass.
